arts.ttl: Red Bull 'targeting FIFTH club takeover' that could see newly-hired Jurgen Klopp tasked with leading an ambitious sporting project in France
arts.sum: Former Liverpool boss Jurgen Klopp (right) could be set to reportedly add a fifth club to his new Red Bull portfolio as the organisation considers purchasing a French second division side.

arts.ttl: When is Israel - France? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Israel, who are playing their home games in the Hungarian capital due to the security situation in the Middle East, are pointless after defeats to Belgium and Italy . On an evening when Italy take on Belgium elsewhere in a big-name UEFA Nations League group, France meet bottom team Israel in Budapest .

arts.ttl: Aymeric Laporte on Spain switch and Didier Deschamps frustration
arts.sum: Spain star Aymeric Laporte has opened up on his decision to switch allegiance from France to La Roja. Laporte has emerged as a crucial player for Luis de la Fuente at the heart of Spain defence which won UEFA Euro 2024 this summer.
